description: Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, determine the drug-drug interaction between the cancer drug 'Abiraterone' and the co-medication 'Atorvastatin'. Document the findings in a file at /sdcard/interaction_result.txt containing four lines: the cancer drug name, the co-medication name, the interaction traffic-light color (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey), and a brief summary of the interaction mechanism or recommendation from the detail view.
